name: Emergency Credit Solutions
description_short: Emergency Credit Solutions is a credit repair provider based in Phoenix, Arizona. Rated 4.9/5 with 57 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Emergency Credit Solutions is a credit repair provider serving clients in Phoenix, Arizona. Carrying a 4.9/5.0 Google rating from 57 reviews, Emergency Credit Solutions has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Phoenix area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Emergency Credit Solutions specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores.

When evaluating credit repair services in Phoenix, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Emergency Credit Solutions operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Phoenix, Arizona area who are considering Emergency Credit Solutions should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.
